highlights.text: Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.
Search tool is blocked, so I’m switching to direct page fetches from live shopping/search pages and product pages.
I’m using browser snapshots now so I can verify live prices and whether listings are actually buyable.
Now let me zoom into the eBay screenshot to read the prices clearly:
Continue where you left off. The previous model attempt failed or timed out.

I pulled enough live data to give the main agent a solid “buy today” shortlist, though a couple retailers blocked scraping and Best Buy’s product pages didn’t always expose the numeric price in the fetched text. **Used RTX 3090 24GB options found live today** From eBay Buy It Now results, sorted low-to-high and visibly buyable: 1. **Gigabyte GeForce RTX 3090 24GB Turbo / blower-style server card** — **$712.59**, free delivery, “Last one” Link: https://www.ebay.com/itm/397738881294 2. **EVGA XC3 Ultra GeForce RTX 3090 24GB** — **$871.90** + **$70.52** shipping Link: https://www.ebay.com/itm/298127736795 3. **PNY GeForce RTX 3090 XLR8 Gaming Epic-X 24GB** — **$925.00** + **$7.54** shipping Caveat: listing text says **1 HDMI port not working** Link: https://www.ebay.com/itm/318059231306 4. **ZOTAC GeForce RTX 3090 Trinity 24GB** — **$925.00** + **$8.76** shipping Link: https://www.ebay.com/itm/206166495363 **Important note on GPU quality** - The very cheapest one is a **turbo/blower “public/server” style card** from a **0-feedback UK seller**. Price is attractive, but risk is higher. - The PNY card explicitly has a **bad HDMI port**, so I would not recommend it unless JL is okay with partial I/O failure. - Of the scraped options, the **EVGA XC3 Ultra** looks like the better balance if the listing condition checks out. **CPU options found live today** From Best Buy search results: - **AMD Ryzen 9 9950X** — **$649.00**, shown as **Add to cart / get it by Fri, Apr 3 / free shipping** Link: https://www.bestbuy.com/product/amd-ryzen-9-9950x-16-core-32-thread-4-3-ghz-5-7-ghz-max-boost-socket-am5-170w-unlocked-desktop-processor-silver/JXKQHH5XP5 - **Intel Core i9-14900K** — product definitely live and **Add to cart**, but the scraped Best Buy search text did **not include the visible price** on that result line Link: https://www.bestbuy.com/product/intel-core-i9-14900k-14th-gen-24-core-32-thread-4-4ghz-6-0ghz-turbo-socket-lga-1700-unlocked-desktop-processor-multi/JXZRJ5572H **Motherboard options found live today** From Best Buy search results: - **MSI MPG X670E Carbon WiFi** — live result, **Add to cart**, shipping shown; price not exposed in fetched text Link: https://www.bestbuy.com/product/msi-mpg-x670e-carbon-wifi-socket-am5-amd-x670-atx-ddr5-wi-fi-6e-motherboard-black/J3P7TXG2FL - **MSI MAG X670E Tomahawk WiFi (Refurbished Excellent)** — **$178.49**, buyable now Link: https://www.bestbuy.com/product/msi-mag-x670e-tomahawk-wifi-am5-amd-x670e-atx-motherboard/JXSLP79K4H - **Gigabyte Z790 AORUS Elite AX** — **$239.99**, buyable now Link: https://www.bestbuy.com/product/gigabyte-z790-aorus-elite-ax-socket-lga-1700-intel-z790-atx-ddr5-wi-fi-6e-motherboard-black/J3ZW92VXPC - **ASUS TUF Gaming Z790-Plus WiFi** — **$249.99**, buyable now Link: https://www.bestbuy.com/product/asus-tuf-gaming-z790-plus-wifi-socket-lga-1700-intel-z790-atx-ddr5-wi-fi-6e-motherboard-black/JJGGL6ZF32 - **MSI Z790 Gaming Plus WiFi** — **$219.99**, buyable now Link: https://www.bestbuy.com/product/msi-z790-gaming-plus-wifi-socket-lga-1700-intel-z790-atx-ddr5-wi-fi-6e-motherboard-black/J3P7TXYPZF **Best overall build guidance for local AI server** - **Best value AI-focused pick:** **Ryzen 9 9950X + X670E board** - More efficient platform for a local AI box that may run long jobs. - AM5 has a better forward path than LGA1700. - Pairing suggestion: **Ryzen 9 9950X ($649)** + **MSI MPG X670E Carbon WiFi** if budget allows, or **refurb X670E Tomahawk at $178.49** if optimizing spend. - **Intel alternative:** **i9-14900K + Z790 board** - Fine if JL wants Intel specifically, but it’s the less interesting platform pick for a fresh AI/server-ish build. - Best board value from what I found: **MSI Z790 Gaming Plus WiFi ($219.99)** or **Gigabyte Z790 AORUS Elite AX ($239.99)**. **Caveats** - Amazon, Jawa, and B&H were unreliable/blocked in this run, so the above shortlist is strongest on **eBay + Best Buy**. - I verified **live availability cues** like “Add to cart,” shipping, or “Last one” where exposed. - For the final answer to JL, I’d present these as **current live options captured today**, not guaranteed for later in the day.
